airport.name: Kunming Changshui International Airport
airport.toCity: Take Metro Line 6, taxi, or airport bus to city center.

transport.metro: Kunming Metro with multiple lines; covers major tourist spots.
transport.taxi: Metered taxis; ensure meter is used to avoid overcharging.
transport.didi: Didi Chuxing app for convenient ride-hailing services.
tips: Use metro for efficient travel during peak hours.
Have hotel address written in Chinese for taxi drivers.
Avoid unofficial taxis at tourist spots.

payment.alipay: Alipay is widely accepted; set up with international card if possible.
payment.wechatPay: WeChat Pay is common; link to international bank account.
payment.cash: Cash is accepted everywhere; carry small denominations.
payment.foreignCard: Foreign cards accepted in some hotels and shops; not always reliable.

tips: Book in advance during peak tourist seasons.
Choose accommodation near metro stations for easy access.
Try local street food for authentic flavors.
Be cautious with spicy dishes if sensitive stomach.

emergency.localTip: Emergency services are efficient; keep hotel address handy.

bestTimeToVisit: Spring (March to May) or autumn (September to November) for mild weather.
touristTips: Learn basic Mandarin phrases for easier communication.
Use public transport to avoid traffic congestion.
Keep valuables secure in crowded areas.
